feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP B1 SDK and B1 Studio Installation
entry.content:
Hello,

i have a question regarding the SAP B1 SDK and SAP B1 Studio installation.

We are running SAP B1 on a windows server in a seperate VM.
I want to start learning how to develope for SAP B1 to expand on its functioality.
Do i need to install the SDK and Studio Suite inside the VM where the SAP Server is running?
Or can i install it on my local machine for development purposes?

If both ways are viable, which one is the preferable one?
If installing it locally is possible, would i need to install a separate server on my local machine, or is the client installation enough for that purpose?

entry.title: Is it still possible to generate add-on ARD?
entry.content:
Hello!

I know that SAP has discontinued the B1DE tool for creating add-ons in the .ARD extension. Additionally, I'm aware that SAP also recommends that add-ons be registered as LW (Light Weight), but my question is: Is it still possible to generate add-ons in .ARD extension nowadays?

I believe it was only possible through the B1DE tool, right? Now that it's no longer available, can we still generate the .ARD installer?

Thanks!

entry.title: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availability for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Referring to the file below, I'm in the middle of preparing for setting up a HA environment now.
File name : Setting_Up_SAP_HANA_Database_High_Availability_for_SAP_Business_One_10.0_for_Automatic_Failover.pdf

Please refer to the image below.

Wondering if it is possible to install SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 as central server OS instead of SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application.

FYI, to give you more clarity on versions, here is the list of 4 types which can exist based on the above.
(1) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application
(2) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2
(3) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 for SAP Application
(4) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4

Looking forward to your reply.
Thanks in advance. 🙂

Bests,
Wonuk Jeon

entry.title: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
Hi All

Is this Query limitation cannot have DocEntry hyper link to drill into posted transactions in this customized Query?

 

SELECT

T8.DocEntry, T8.DocNum,
T2.DocNum,
T7a.[U_AF_MAJORGRP], T7a.[U_AF_OVERGRP],
T7b.ItmsGrpNam,
T7.ItemCode, T7.Dscription,
T7.Quantity, T7a.InvntryUom, T8.DocDate, T8.DocDueDate,
T8.CardCode, T8.CardName, T7.Price

 

--T6.DocNum,
--T10.DocNum

FROM POR1 T1
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPOR T2
ON T1.DocEntry = T2.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PDN1 T3
ON T2.DocEntry = T3.BaseEntry
AND T1.LineNum = T3.BaseLine
AND T1.ItemCode = T3.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPDN T4 ON T3.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPD1 T5 ON T4.DocEntry = T5.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T5.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T5.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPD T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PCH1 T7 ON T4.DocEntry = T7.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T7.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPCH T8 ON T7.DocEntry = T8.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T7a ON T7.[ItemCode] = T7a.[ItemCode]
INNER JOIN OITB T7b ON T7a.[ItmsGrpCod] = T7b.[ItmsGrpCod]
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPC1 T9 ON T8.DocEntry = T9.BaseEntry AND T7.LineNum = T9.BaseLine AND T7.ItemCode = T9.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPC T10 ON T9.DocEntry = T10.DocEntry

WHERE
T8.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T8.[DocDate] <=[%1]
ORDER BY

--T2.DocNum,
--T1.LineNum,
--T4.DocNum,
--T3.LineNum,
--T6.DocNum,
--T5.LineNum,
T8.DocNum
--T7.LineNum,
--T10.DocNum,
--T9.LineNum

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Hi All

I managed to write this FMS Query to auto Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0] and able to search Item Number after typing BT Catalogue UDF but once I TAB to next field BT Catalogue UDF value disappeared.  Please advise is there any step I missed out or is this a FMS limitation search on Item Master Data UDF in Sales Quotation?

 

Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0]

 

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: User management in Add on empty of content
entry.content:
After migrating from FP2208 to FP2405 we are having problems with the native SAP Add Ons. EFM, Outlook Integration and Payment.


The fact is that when accessing user management to specify their behavior per user, the user list is empty...

how can it be?

Nobody from SAP?
No forum moderator?

SAP Business One Extensibility SAP Business One

entry.title: How to block Sales Order and Delivery when the previous AR Invoice Transaction is not yet paid
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Im writing and developing a code for my Transaction Notification yet i cant figure it out anyone can help me, this is the details :

I want to Block the Sales Order and Delivery with the following condition
1. If there are previous AR Invoice(Last Transaction) are not paid
2. If the last Delivery of the customer is not yet copied or encoded to AR Invoice.
3. if Due date + 10 Days has past from the due of the invoice

entry.title: Billing and Shipping Address in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hii Experts,

i have a scenario where I make an order from one location that is my billing location will be different and I need the materials to be shipped to a different location. How do I achieve this in SAP business one.

entry.title: BP Master Data - 'ID No. 2' field is not editable for a specific user
entry.content:
Hi, 

The issue happen to this specific user, the user  has full authorization for business partner master data, however, the field ‘Company Reg No’ (original name of this field is 'ID No. 2') is not editable. This happen to all BP types, whether is Add or Update mode. There is no UI configuration in the BP master data.

I have tried login using this affected user, go to edit UI configuration, and tried 'Restore Default' UI, but no help.

Any idea?

Phoebe

entry.title: Blocking of Sales Order thru SP Transaction Notification
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Im about to block Sales Order thru SP Notification, I Create a simple code to check if the customer has Open Invoices in the AR Module and if it does, it will block the sales order for that particular order unless the AR Document of the previous transaction is closed here is my code.

IF(@object_type = '17') and (@transaction_type in ('A', 'U'))

BEGIN

IF Exists (SELECT T0.CardCode FROM OINV T0

WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T0.[DocStatus] = 'O' AND T0.CANCELED='N' )

BEGIN

SET @error = 1001

SET @error_message = 'You have Pending AR invoice Open, Please Settle Customer Account. Thank you!'

End

End

Apparently the code block Sales Order for all Customers even they dont have AR Invoice Open Documents.

what you think is the problem? anyone can help me?

entry.title: Last Invoice Date in List of Customer Business Partners
entry.content:
Hi All

Is it possible to show Last Invoice Date in List of Customer Business Partner Master Data or Query Statement?

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Remove yellow drill down arrows in query
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to remove the yellow drill down arrows in this query. Especially for the field DocNum because the wrong documents open because of Union All.

Is this the right way to do that? CAST (T0.[DocNum] as nvarchar) as 'Documentnummer', 

 

 

SELECT
'Klantorder' AS 'Document',
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode],
T0.[CardName],
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[TreeType]

FROM
ORDR T0
INNER JOIN RDR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]

WHERE
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T1.[Dscription] Like '%%[%1]%%' AND
T1.[TreeType] <> 'I' AND
T0.[CANCELED] = 'N'

UNION ALL

SELECT
'Uitgaande factuur en betaling' AS 'Document',
T0.[DocDate],
T0.[CardCode],
T0.[CardName],
T0.[DocNum],
T1.[ItemCode],
T1.[Dscription],
T1.[Quantity],
T1.[TreeType]

FROM
OINV T0
INNER JOIN INV1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]

WHERE
T0.[CardCode] =[%0] AND
T1.[Dscription] Like '%%[%1]%%' AND
T1.[TreeType] <> 'I' AND
T0.[CANCELED] = 'N' AND
T0.[IsICT] = 'Y'

ORDER BY
2

entry.title: Approve a document via Service Layer - SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I need to approve a document via Service Layer.
The API call below allows me to approve a document using the user currently logged-in (the user of the current Service Layer session).

PATCH https://myhost:50000/b1s/v1/ApprovalRequests(1)

{
"ApprovalRequestDecisions": [
{
"Status": "ardApproved",
"Remarks": "Approved - OK"
}
]
}

How can I approve a document assigned to another user please?
Where can I find documentation for the ApprovalRequestDecisions API call please?

I'm using FP2202 HF1.

Thank you,
Best Regards,
Claudio

entry.title: Workaround to reconcile AR Invoice(having WTax of type Payment) with the On Account Incoming Payment
entry.content:
At present when I am trying to reconcile I get this message - Use the same payment category withholding tax code for all transactions during reconciliation.

Please suggest a work around.

I am using SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.230) SP 2311 (Security) HOTFIX1 (64-bit)

entry.title: Error while Enable the Audit Database logs
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
 
While creating the Audit log policy we are facing error message as attached in the screenshot.
 
Please check & revert with the workaround.
 
Thanks in advance.
 

 

Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Equipment Card Search
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When searching in equipment card window, in the list displayed, Item Number is showing Item Description. Is this a bug? In Item Description, it is showing the correct information. There are no other fields showing the Item Code.

SAP B1 is version 10.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Formatted Search for Bin Location Allocation
entry.content:
Hello Experts, Hope you are well!

I am currently trying to develop a new FMS UDF to integrate into our Goods Receipt PO table in the aim to display the allocated BIn location for each line. however my logic need some work:

SELECT  T1.[BinCode] FROM PDN1 T0  INNER JOIN OBIN T1 ON T0.DftBinAbs = T1.AbsEntry WHERE T0.[ItemCode] = $[861.3.0]

Is this somthing that is possible to achieve?

entry.title: Editar casilla Factura ventas Importe del Impuesto
entry.content:
Hola a todos!

en ocasiones tenemos discrepancia en las facturas clientes en el impuesto.

En proveedores, la casilla "importe del impuesto" se la deja modificar cuando alguna discrepancia en el importe del IVA por redondeos.

En clientes, este campo no podemos editarlo. ¿Hay alguna forma de mantener el campo editable en ventas también igual que está en compras?

entry.title: Menu bar not showing properly #60930
entry.content:
Dear Expert,
 
We are experiencing an issue in SAP where the menu text appears in white font color, making it invisible. We attempted to resolve this by changing the skin style from Belize Deep to Fiori, but this resulted in a change to the home page color.
 
I have checked the User Master and found that no default user is mapped. To verify, I compared the settings for the client and noticed that the User Master Display Skin Style is blank, whereas in my case, it is set to Belize Deep.
 
I tried clicking on "Restore Default" and updated the settings, but after refreshing the page, the same settings reappear.
 
Could you please advise on what might be causing this issue and how we can resolve it?
 
 
Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Required SP Transaction Notification for to Restrict user to Update Batch Expiration Date SAP b1
entry.content:
Hi,

We Required SP Transaction Notification  Restrict user to Update Batch Expiration Date SAP b1 10.0
